heading: Farm-Fresh Purity
description: Every product raised without antibiotics, hormones, or artificial chemicals.

items.name: Desi Chicken
items.desc: Free-range native breeds raised on clean feed and open grazing.
items.description: Our desi chickens are raised in free-range conditions on natural feed, without antibiotics or hormones. Native breeds like Kadaknath, Srinidhi, and Sonali are selected for their superior meat quality and nutritional content. The result is flavourful, protein-rich meat that is perfect for health-conscious families. Slow-grown, ethically raised, and delivered fresh from our Goa farm.
items.metaTitle: Fresh Desi Chicken Goa | Alliance Street Organic Farms
items.metaDescription: Buy free-range desi chicken from native breeds (Kadaknath, Srinidhi) raised without antibiotics in Goa. 100% organic, farm-fresh. ₹450/kg.

items.name: Desi Eggs
items.desc: Country chicken eggs — hormone-free and naturally nutritious.
items.description: Our desi eggs come from free-range country chickens living in natural conditions with access to sunlight, open grazing, and clean water. These eggs are 3× richer in Omega-3 fatty acids and have significantly higher Vitamin E and Vitamin D compared to commercial eggs. The deep orange yolk is a direct indicator of superior nutritional density and clean, natural feeding practices. No caging, no artificial light cycles — ever.
highlights: No cage rearing, no artificial lighting
Better for children and the elderly
items.metaTitle: Farm-Fresh Desi Eggs Goa | Alliance Street Organic Farms
items.metaDescription: Buy free-range country chicken eggs from Goa — 3× more Omega-3, deep orange yolk, zero antibiotics. Naturally nutritious. ₹15/egg.

items.name: Goat Meat
items.desc: Tender meat from Osmanabadi & Konkan Kanyal breeds.
items.description: Premium goat meat from indigenous Indian breeds — Osmanabadi and Konkan Kanyal — perfectly adapted to Goa's coastal climate. These breeds are raised entirely free-range on natural grazing without any chemical supplements, producing tender, lean meat with exceptional depth of flavour. Low in fat and cholesterol compared to other red meats, our chevon and mutton is ideal for health-conscious diets that don't compromise on taste.
highlights: Lower fat than commercial goat meat
items.metaTitle: Fresh Goat Meat Goa | Mutton & Chevon | Alliance Street Organic Farms
items.metaDescription: Buy fresh goat meat (mutton/chevon) from indigenous Osmanabadi & Konkan Kanyal breeds in Goa. Free-range, no chemicals. ₹600/kg.

items.name: Goat Milk
items.desc: Chemical-free, nutrient-dense milk from happy, healthy goats.
items.description: Our goat milk comes from Konkan Kanyal goats grazing naturally across our Goa farmland. Naturally A2, it is easier to digest than cow's milk — ideal for people who experience discomfort with conventional dairy. Packed with calcium, magnesium, and essential vitamins, our milk is collected fresh daily and delivered without homogenisation or ultra-pasteurisation. What you get is real, whole goat milk — exactly as nature intended.
highlights: Easier to digest than cow's milk
Rich in calcium, magnesium & Vitamin A
items.metaTitle: Fresh Goat Milk Goa | A2 Protein | Alliance Street Organic Farms
items.metaDescription: Buy fresh A2 goat milk from Konkan Kanyal goats in Goa. Easier to digest, naturally nutritious, no chemicals. ₹80/litre.

items.name: Rabbit Meat
items.desc: Lean, low-cholesterol protein from premium rabbit breeds.
items.description: Rabbit meat is among the leanest and most protein-efficient meats available anywhere. With minimal cholesterol and an impressive protein-to-fat ratio, it is increasingly prescribed by nutritionists and physicians for therapeutic diets. Our premium rabbit breeds — Californian, New Zealand White, and Grey Giant — produce fine-textured, delicate meat with a mild, clean flavour that suits a wide range of cuisines from Goan to continental.
highlights: Lowest cholesterol of any common meat
Breeds: Californian, New Zealand White, Grey Giant
Raised without antibiotics or growth promoters
items.metaTitle: Fresh Rabbit Meat Goa | Alliance Street Organic Farms
items.metaDescription: Buy lean, low-cholesterol rabbit meat from premium breeds raised without antibiotics in Goa. Ideal for health-conscious diets. ₹700/kg.
